nasb.text: I will establish My covenant between Me and you and your descendants after you throughout their generations for an everlasting covenant, to be God to you and to your descendants after you.

esv.text: And I will establish my covenant between me and you and your offspring after you throughout their generations for an everlasting covenant, to be God to you and to your offspring after you.

cnv.text: 我要與你，和你世世代代的後裔，堅立我的約，成為永遠的約，使我作你和你的後裔的　神。

ccb.text: 我要和你并你的子子孙孙立永恒的约，我要做你和你子孙的上帝。

csbs.text: 我要与你以及你世世代代的后裔确立我的约，作为永远的约，我要成为你和你后裔的神。
